headline: What's on the bench right now
note: This list changes often — it's whatever I'm genuinely building this month.

items.title: VIVEK — RAG for the Garuda Purāṇa
items.description: Natural-language querying over the Garuda Purāṇa corpus: FAISS vector search, bge-large embeddings, model caching to kill cold-starts, deployed on GCP Cloud Run.

items.title: AI Agent Twin for this house
items.description: A conversational AI version of me — it will live in the hallway robot and answer questions about my work from an external agent endpoint.

items.title: Deep dive: LLM internals & MCP
items.description: Transformer architecture, fine-tuning fundamentals and Model Context Protocol — sharpening the theory behind the systems I ship at work.
